description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs, argon and boron, both running in the default test stage. The argon job uses the node:argon Docker image and executes the shell commands "npm i" then "npm t". The boron job uses the node:boron Docker image and executes the shell command "npm it". Cache the node_modules directory for both jobs, and do not define any special rules, artifacts, or deployment targets.
